text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking with Mejiro Dober...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We were just on our way to see you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fine and Hishiama? What did you need me for?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Remember that hot pot roulette tea party we had
before? We were hoping to hold another one.
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-that again? ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, a while back, Fine invited us to a tea party,
and...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone! Let's make a mystery hot pot
that'll go well with tea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't tea parties usually involve chiffon cake and
cookies? What kind of hot pot would go with
tea?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that sounds fun! It'll be like we're brewing a
potion! Let's put a bunch of stuff in!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Let's not go overboard!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This is my first mystery hot pot. We never did
these at the Mejiro estate...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This is a first for me too! I'm sure it will make for a
great reminiscent clover!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder who brought the most interesting
ingredient? All right, let's get this hot pot
roulette started! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Th-this looks kind of toxic...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What's this? Rainbow candy?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's my Special ☆ Magic Candy! It has
seven mysterious flavors and—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yuck! Or it's supposed to, anyway! What are
these bitter seeds?! It's not sweet at all now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That must be my contribution. Ardan gave me
some medicinal ingredients to use.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Plus I got protein powder from Ryan, so I put that
in too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Those sound like really healthy
ingredients! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-I feel like my macarons are the most normal
thing in there now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: By the way... What did you put in, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Me? Black pudding. ♪

text_block_list.name: Everyone but Fine
text_block_list.text: Ewwwww!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
After that, everyone made a fuss about the smell,
and Hishiama got really mad at us...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Going into the kitchen gave me the scare of my
life! Some weird smoke was pourin' out of it, and
everyone had collapsed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm gonna be there this time, so nothing like
that'll happen again!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We'll make it a fun and delicious hot pot
roulette party this time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... I'm sure it'll be fine with Hishiama
there, but...
choice_data_list: Go on and make some fun memories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...What are you so excited for?
choice_data_list:
You have what it takes to win, whether it's a
race or hot pot roulette.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not going to hold back if I'm doing this,
but I don't know how well I'll do...
choice_data_list:
You have what it takes to win, whether it's a
race or hot pot roulette.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Don't be ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pfft. Don't be silly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to head to the shopping district and see
what tasty and interesting things I can get, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to head to the shopping district and see
what tasty and interesting things I can get, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...See you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second hot pot roulette party concludes
without any strange smells, but it apparently still
tasted diabolical.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Mejiro Dober seems quite satisfied,
since she was crowned Hot Pot Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I was planning on doing solo training today...
choice_data_list:
You have to enjoy yourself outside of racing
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Who are you? My keeper?
choice_data_list:
Being with friends is one of the best parts of
school life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You really think so?
choice_data_list:
Being with friends is one of the best parts of
school life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...All right, fine. I'll go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I suppose I'll go spend some time with
everyone, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second hot pot roulette party concludes
without any strange smells, but it apparently still
tasted diabolical.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second hot pot roulette party concludes
without any strange smells, but it apparently still
tasted diabolical.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, Mejiro Dober looks quite happy as she
recounts the details of the party to me.
